focus: Should doctor _routes.yaml trigger_phrases be actively wired into the advisor signal map, or is the presentation-menu-driven dispatch intentionally exempt from Gate-2 lexical routing (and the header comment simply wrong)?

graphEvents.label: Should doctor routes trigger_phrases be wired into advisor
Doctor routes trigger_phrases header Consumed-by claim is false not stale
Advisor harvester never reads .opencode/commands in either runtime
Python shim and TS daemon doc-frontmatter harvest code plus ENV_REFERENCE and git history

label: doctor/_routes.yaml:7 header comment '# Consumed by: Skill Advisor lexical lane (per-target trigger_phrases)' is affirmatively false: both the Python shim (skill_advisor.py:810-871, _DOC_HARVEST_SUBDIRS=(references,assets) rooted at SKILLS_DIR) and the TS daemon (doc-frontmatter.ts:23) only harvest .opencode/skills/*/{references,assets}/*.md frontmatter, gated by SPECKIT_ADVISOR_DOC_TRIGGERS; neither ever reads a .yaml file or a path under .opencode/commands/. Confirmed via git log --follow -p that this header line has been unchanged and unchallenged since its introduction in commit 10b76891c2 across 17+ subsequent revisions of the file.

Advisor doc-frontmatter trigger-phrase harvest is scoped exclusively to .opencode/skills/*/{references,assets}/*.md in both the Python and TS implementations; no code path reads .opencode/commands/** for trigger_phrases

direction: doctor_skill-advisor.yaml/doctor_memory.yaml trigger_phrases mentions being the same dead-wiring defect class
reason: those correctly reference the real, harvested derived.trigger_phrases field in .opencode/skills/{skill}/graph-metadata.json, a different and properly-wired mechanism

direction: the four create/assets trigger_phrases hits (create_skill_auto.yaml, create_skill_confirm.yaml, create_readme_auto.yaml, create_readme_confirm.yaml) being adjacent instances of the dead-wiring class
reason: these are correctly-scoped authoring instructions telling the skill-creation workflow to populate the real harvested frontmatter field on new skill docs, not a claim that the workflow YAML's own trigger_phrases are consumed

direction: the presentation-menu-driven dispatch being an intentional, documented exemption from Gate-2 lexical routing
reason: no design doc, decision record, or code comment anywhere states an intentional exemption; the harvester's scope simply never included .opencode/commands/, so there was never a decision to exempt doctor routes -- the header comment asserts a consumption path that was never built
